title: Guidelines detailing recommendations and standards for force calibration of testing machines under dynamic force taking into account parasitic influences from multi-component forces and temperature effects
author: Kumme Rolf
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Current guideline was developed in frameworks of ComTraForce project 18SIB08 and provides recommendations and standards for force calibration of testing machines under dynamic force taking into account parasitic influences from multi-component forces and temperature effects.
steps_raw: Current guideline was developed in frameworks of ComTraForce project 18SIB08 and provides recommendations and standards for force calibration of testing machines under dynamic force taking into account parasitic influences from multi-component forces and temperature effects.
